description: These numero uno chunky boots with sturdy soles, leather upper and rugged design are a closet essential. If you're heading off into the wild wear these shoes to protect your feet, or if you want to capture a manly workwear style, wear this pair with distressed denims and a T-shirt and throw on a leather jacket. Upper Smooth brown leather upper for durability and comfort Tuck detail at the heel for a curved Fit and style Leather collar in black Fleecy inner and suede footbed for foot comfort Lace-up system in a derby style for snug, customised fit Brand tab on tongue Pull loop on heel Midsole Enhanced midsole for lightweight, cushioned comfort Outsole Chunky heel with open leather effect Durable outsole with heavy duty grooves and lugs shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in direct sunlight
